title: NVIDIA/SkillSpector
friendlyTitle: NVIDIA/SkillSpector checks AI agent skills for risk
summary: SkillSpector is an NVIDIA security scanner for AI agent skills, designed to detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns and other risks before skills are installed.
friendlySummary: SkillSpector scans agent skills for risky or malicious patterns before you install them.
whyItMatters: Use it as a pre-install review step for agent skill repositories, URLs, zip files or local folders. It is especially relevant as teams add third-party skills and MCP-style extensions to increasingly capable agents.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It is useful as a safety check when adding new abilities to an AI agent, especially from outside sources.
